nasb.text: But he said, “Now bring meal.” He threw it into the pot and said, “Pour it out for the people that they may eat.” Then there was no harm in the pot.

esv.text: He said, “Then bring flour.” And he threw it into the pot and said, “Pour some out for the men, that they may eat.” And there was no harm in the pot.

cnv.text: 他說：“拿些麵給我。”他把麵放在鍋中，說：“倒出來給眾人吃吧。”鍋裡就沒有毒了。

ccb.text: 以利沙说：“拿点面粉来。”他把面粉撒在锅里，说：“倒出来给众人喝吧。”于是，汤里没有毒了。
